examples.title: Intermediate Machine Learning Troubleshooting Part 4C Pattern
examples.code:
# Python implementation for Machine Learning Troubleshooting Part 4C
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
examples.explanation: Applied engineering pattern showing Machine Learning Troubleshooting Part 4C in a structured context.

# Python implementation for Machine Learning Troubleshooting Part 4C
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':

    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
